suite.name: Report Test

kw.name: Setup Session and Login
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '55', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "reporttester01", "password": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1hdGM4NnUwMDIydmR5a2F6MXg1aDNkIiwicm9sZSI6IlBBU1NFTkdFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MjU1NTMzMCwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNTU4OTMwfQ.Mu-gOls89N0Bgd8vnehvtW1YU2puxp_nymuy0thherE', 'Content-Length': '55', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "reporttester02", "password": "123456789"}'

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

สร้าง Session และ Login ทุก role

test.name: Create Report Simple Case

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${body} = {'reportedUserIds': ['cmmatfbho004lvdykyd2j4jhd'], 'category': 'DANGEROUS_DRIVING', 'description': 'คนขับขับรถเร็วเกินกำหนดมากและปาดซ้ายปาดขวาตลอดทาง'}
kw.arg: description=คนขับขับรถเร็วเกินกำหนดมากและปาดซ้ายปาดขวาตลอดทาง
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app/api/reports path_url=/api/reports headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1hdGM4NnUwMDIydmR5a2F6MXg1aDNkIiwicm9sZSI6IlBBU1NFTkdFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MjU1NTMzMCwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNTU4OTMwfQ.Mu-gOls89N0Bgd8vnehvtW1YU2puxp_nymuy0thherE', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxxemw5bzMwMDAwZXdyN3Y0azMwYmVlIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzcyNTU1MzMyLCJleHAiOjE3NzI1NTg5MzJ9.nBqXiFAgcH9LhZ84Fb3JZprG7Brk8PuSPWxtODmZ3LQ', 'Content-Length': '396', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"reportedUserIds": ["cmmatfbho004lvdykyd2j4jhd"], "category": "DANGEROUS_DRIVING", "description": "\\u0e04\\u0e19\\u0e02\\u0e31\\u0e1a\\u0e02\\u0e31\\u0e1a\\u0e23\\u0e16\\u0e40\\u0e23\\u0e47\\u0e27\\u0e40\\u0e01\\u0e34\\u0e19\\u0e01\\u0e33\\u0e2b\\u0e19\\u0e14\\u0e21\\u0e32\\u0e01\\u0e41\\u0e25\\u0e30\\u0e1b\\u0e32\\u0e14\\u0e0b\\u0e49\\u0e32\\u0e22\\u0e1b\\u0e32\\u0e14\\u0e02\\u0e27\\u0e32\\u0e15\\u0e25\\u0e2d\\u0e14\\u0e17\\u0e32\\u0e07"}'

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: แอดมินดูรายการรีพอร์ตทั้งหมด

test.name: Admin Assign Report

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: ${body} = {'status': 'RESOLVED', 'adminNotes': 'ตรวจสอบเรียบร้อย'}

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
